TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version 11.5.2600.32.W updated on CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the RMM portal and identified that the CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 were running an outdated version of ManageEngine. downloaded and installed the latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) of the ManageEngine agent. scan the system with the portal that the device now runs the updated agent version

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - CCC-DC-SQL-02.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Secure Client(Version:5.1.16.194) Manual Update Required on DESKTOP-4TTOOKT,CCC-DC-SQL-02
TimeEntry.Notes: After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:DESKTOP-4TTOOKT,CCC-DC-SQL-02.The following components need to be manually uploaded and installed:Cisco Secure Client & AnyConnect VPN (5.1.16.194) Manual installation required Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.16.194)  Manual installation required Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup files on the affected systems. Once the installation is completed, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems reflect the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - CCC-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-AD-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.150 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.146. Connected to the machines (CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server ( CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 ) is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully Then logged in to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine

TimeEntry.Title: ScreenConnect Remote Support updated with Version 26.1.25.9592 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: ScreenConnect Remote Support updated with Version 26.1.25.9592 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01

TimeEntry.Title: Offboarding of machine Kim-Laptop and upgradation to window 11
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by Rishad, removed Technijian tools and other applications from Kim-Laptop. Disjoined the machine from Domain and setup local profile.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: created a local account om the machine. Clean the machine from moving the files from domain profile to user profile. then setup the local account browsers with all the data without any loss, uninstall the application.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the handover, the KIM system required an upgrade to Windows 11.

Connected to the system and first installed all pending Windows 10 updates. After ensuring the system was fully updated, initiated the Windows 11 download and completed the upgrade.

Post-upgrade, verified the installation and installed all pending Windows 11 updates to ensure the system is fully up to date.

TimeEntry.Title: CCC– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CCC Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CCC. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the vCenter and check the following machines CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01. needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra, had a call about the files. showed the user how to save the files from onedrive. moved the files.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: We have successfully removed the domain account from your machine and transitioned you to a local account (Chuck Culp). All files from the domain profile have been migrated, and your browser data, including saved passwords and bookmarks, has also been transferred. Check the 365 and servers (CCC). create a quotation.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra machine, remove the machine domain. copied the onedrive files to a hard drive. removed all the apps (technijian and culpco)

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.150. Connected to the machines (CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.162. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.
